title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: NetworkManager-libreswan bug fix and enhancement update

full_text:
An update for NetworkManager-libreswan is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

This package contains software for integrating the libreswan VPN software with NetworkManager and the GNOME desktopBug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [FR] NM-libreswan - Support for sending left certificate(leftsendcert) in X.509-Based VPN Authentication [rhel-10.0.z] (JIRA:RHEL-110773)
